rootCauseSummary: The observed binary selected the baseline sha256_block_data_order_riscv64 path, but current OpenSSL already has RISC-V SHA-256 Zbb and vector runtime dispatch; the safe Agent4 action is to document SHA-2 capability override diagnostics instead of changing generic RISC-V build flags.
patchSummary: 候选补丁应只修改 doc/man3/OPENSSL_riscvcap.pod，记录 RISC-V SHA-2 override 诊断示例和默认 target baseline 边界。

problem.summary: The openssl_test_slh_dsa profile on SG2044 reports sha256_block_data_order_riscv64 as a scalar RISC-V hot path with no vector instructions.
evidence: Agent3 diagnosis diag-20260612-180518 reports duration 69.308967879 seconds, IPC 2.047, and L1 data-cache load miss rate 0.074%, suggesting a compute-bound SHA-256 path.
perf annotate for sha256_block_data_order_riscv64 shows scalar lbu, lw, sw, sllw, srlw, or, xor, and addw instruction sequences and no v* vector instructions.

The original report recommends adding -march=rv64gc_zba_zbb to linux64-riscv64, but also sets allow_auto_forward_to_agent4=false because ARM baseline, readelf Tag_RISCV_arch, and hwprobe evidence are missing.
Current OpenSSL master already includes RISC-V SHA-256 baseline, Zbb, and vector SHA-256 implementations in crypto/sha/build.info and dispatches them in crypto/sha/sha_riscv.c.
Raising the generic linux64-riscv64 -march baseline would allow compilers to emit extension instructions in ordinary C code and could break RISC-V systems without those extensions.

rootCause.summary: The observed binary selected the baseline sha256_block_data_order_riscv64 path, but current OpenSSL already has RISC-V SHA-256 Zbb and vector runtime dispatch; the safe Agent4 action is to document SHA-2 capability override diagnostics instead of changing generic RISC-V build flags.
performanceFactors: SLH-DSA SHA2 parameter sets repeatedly call SHA-256, so sha256_block_data_order_riscv64 can dominate a compute-bound profile.
crypto/sha/sha_riscv.c selects vector SHA-256 when ZVKB plus ZVKNHA or ZVKNHB and VLEN >= 128 are detected, otherwise Zbb when Zbb is detected, otherwise the baseline RV64 path.
OPENSSL_riscvcap can be used to test runtime capability selection, but it does not change compiler-selected base architecture or prove the profiled FIPS module was built with a given -march.
Documentation currently lists capability names but does not show SHA-2-specific override examples or explain the distinction between runtime dispatch diagnostics and default RISC-V target policy.

mustPreserve: Do not change default RISC-V Configure targets or force new -march extensions.
Do not change SLH-DSA, FIPS provider, digest semantics, generated assembly, or SHA-256 dispatch logic without target hardware evidence and dedicated tests.
Keep the patch behavior-neutral and limited to documentation.
Clearly prefer Linux hwprobe-based runtime detection for normal execution.

patchPlan.objective: The observed binary selected the baseline sha256_block_data_order_riscv64 path, but current OpenSSL already has RISC-V SHA-256 Zbb and vector runtime dispatch; the safe Agent4 action is to document SHA-2 capability override diagnostics instead of changing generic RISC-V build flags.

changes.rationale: The observed binary selected the baseline sha256_block_data_order_riscv64 path, but current OpenSSL already has RISC-V SHA-256 Zbb and vector runtime dispatch; the safe Agent4 action is to document SHA-2 capability override diagnostics instead of changing generic RISC-V build flags.
instructions: 添加最小的、保持行为不变的文档说明，展示 RISC-V SHA-2 capability override 诊断用法。
明确 OPENSSL_riscvcap 影响 runtime-dispatched implementations，不改变 compiler-selected architecture flags 或 linux64-riscv64 默认 target baseline。
明确普通 Linux 执行应优先使用 hwprobe-detected capabilities。
避免无关重构和格式噪音。

patchPlan.expectedDiffSummary: 候选补丁应只修改 doc/man3/OPENSSL_riscvcap.pod，记录 RISC-V SHA-2 override 诊断示例和默认 target baseline 边界。

patchCandidate.gitDiff:
diff --git a/doc/man3/OPENSSL_riscvcap.pod b/doc/man3/OPENSSL_riscvcap.pod
index 3113b98..5edddc1 100644
--- a/doc/man3/OPENSSL_riscvcap.pod
+++ b/doc/man3/OPENSSL_riscvcap.pod
@@ -205,6 +205,26 @@ Only enable the vector extension:
 
  export OPENSSL_riscvcap="rv64gc_v"
 
+Enable RISC-V Zbb SHA-2 override testing:
+
+ export OPENSSL_riscvcap="rv64gc_zbb"
+
+Enable RISC-V vector SHA-256 override testing:
+
+ export OPENSSL_riscvcap="rv64gc_v_zvkb_zvknha"
+
+Enable RISC-V vector SHA-512 override testing:
+
+ export OPENSSL_riscvcap="rv64gc_v_zvkb_zvknhb"
+
+These SHA-specific overrides are intended for diagnostics and benchmarking.
+They affect runtime-dispatched implementations and do not change the
+compiler-selected base architecture, the default linux64-riscv64 target
+baseline, or compile-time __riscv_zbb code generation. Vector length remains
+detected from hardware and is not overridden by these examples. For normal
+Linux execution, prefer hwprobe-detected capabilities over setting
+SHA-specific overrides.
+
 =head1 COPYRIGHT

tests.name: git_diff_check
tests.output: git diff --check reported no whitespace errors.

tests.name: riscv_sha256_dispatch_source_consistency
tests.output: rg confirmed the new OPENSSL_riscvcap SHA examples, existing RISC-V SHA-2 dispatch symbols, and the linux64-riscv64 target context.

regressionResult.summary: Local documentation, OpenSpec, whitespace, and source consistency checks passed, but Agent1 regression could not run because the agent1 command is not available in this environment.

instructions: 以 Git 差异和回归证据作为事实来源。
在不改变已验证补丁内容的前提下准备拉取请求和提交材料。
在提交说明中保留 RootCauseBlueprint 和回归证据。
